title: Django REST Bookstore API
description: A full-featured RESTful API for an online bookstore built with Django REST Framework. Includes JWT authentication, search, filtering, pagination, and automated test coverage.

title: Stellar Data Pipeline
description: An automated data pipeline that fetches astronomical datasets, cleans and transforms them with Pandas, and generates publication-ready visualisations using Matplotlib and Seaborn.

title: Student Portal System
description: A Django-based student management portal with role-based access, attendance tracking, grade management, and a responsive dashboard for administrators and students.
